zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Douglas of Dalkeith於1375年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安達爾凱斯時，她的父親James Douglas 1st of Dalkeith50歲，母親Lady Agnes de Dunbar40歲。她和Sir John Hamilton - 4th Laird of Cadzow至少有1個兒子。她去世於1410年6月12日在蘇格蘭藍納可爾卡焦福享年35歲。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Douglas of Dalkeith was born in 1375, in Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scotland, her father, James Douglas 1st of Dalkeith, was 50 and her mother, Lady Agnes de Dunbar, was 40. She had at least 1 son with Sir John Hamilton - 4th Laird of Cadzow. She died on 12 June 1410, in Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet Douglas of Dalkeith est née en 1375, à Dalkeith, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, James Douglas 1st of Dalkeith, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes de Dunbar, avait 40 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Sir John Hamilton - 4th Laird of Cadzow. Elle est décédée le 12 juin 1410, à Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janet Douglas of Dalkeith 1375 in Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Douglas 1st of Dalkeith 50 und ihre Mutter Lady Agnes de Dunbar 40. Sie hatte mit Sir John Hamilton - 4th Laird of Cadzow mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 12. Juni 1410 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Douglas of Dalkeith è nata il nel 1375 nel Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scotland, sua padre, James Douglas 1st of Dalkeith, aveva 50 anni e sua madre, Lady Agnes de Dunbar, aveva 40 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Sir John Hamilton - 4th Laird of Cadzow. Morì il 12 giugno 1410, nel Cadzow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Douglas of Dalkeithが1375年にスコットランドミドロスアンダルケイスで生まれた時，父James Douglas 1st of Dalkeithは50歳，母Lady Agnes de Dunbarは40歳であった。彼女はSir John Hamilton - 4th Laird of Cadzowとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1410年6月12日にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアカドゾウで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Douglas of Dalkeith(이)가 1375년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 다케이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Douglas 1st of Dalkeith(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Agnes de Dunbar(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 Sir John Hamilton - 4th Laird of Cadzow(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1410년 6월 12일 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 카드즈에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet Douglas of Dalkeith родилась в 1375 г. в местности далкит, мидлотян, Шотландия, её отцу по имени James Douglas 1st of Dalkeith было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes de Dunbar, 40. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Sir John Hamilton - 4th Laird of Cadzow. Она умерла 12 июня 1410 г. в местности кадзоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия в возрасте 35 лет.
